social.name: Javier Milei
social.text: RT by @JMilei: Por primera vez en la historia, un Gobierno se acuerda del "hombre olvidado", el mal llamado "contribuyente"... el pagador de impuestos. Toda la vida de este país hemos ido aumentando la presión tributaria sobre estas personas olvidadas. La Argentina de Javier Mile

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu visited the Haifa Naval Base today, together with the Commander of the Navy, Vice Admiral Eyal Harel. During the visit, the Prime Minister received an operational briefing on the navy's activities and spoke with the fighters at the base.

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
I am sad to hear of the passing of Sir George Howarth. 

A lifetime of public service, George served his party, his country, and the people of Knowsley with distinction. 

My thoughts, and those of the entire Labour movement, are with his family at this difficult time.

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text: One of the greatest England matches I’ve ever seen. We are through to the quarter finals!

social.name: Nicolas Maduro
social.text: Hace 215 años encontramos nuestro camino para siempre: el camino de la dignidad, la igualdad y la libertad. En estos días duros que vivimos, renovemos la certeza de que, en oración, en acción y como nación unida, junto a la solidaridad permanente de los pueblos del mundo.
